overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal village at night. The character walks through organic woven archways and bamboo pathways surrounded by bioluminescent vegetation and elaborate wooden structures built into massive trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered woven archway tunnel toward the village exit

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing at attention holding a spear
tribal guard standing at attention holding a spear

entered.detail: organic tunnel structure made of woven branches and vines forming a covered passage
glowing spherical lanterns hanging from the archway ceiling
massive wooden root structures supporting the overhead architecture

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered archway made of woven organic materials. Bioluminescent lanterns provide soft lighting while tribal guards stand at attention on either side. The tunnel creates an enclosed, sheltered passage leading toward the village center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village plaza with massive tree structures

events.description: exits covered archway into open tribal village plaza with massive tree buildings

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel and walking into the open village square

entered.detail: enormous structures built into living trees with intricate wooden platforms
large glowing spherical huts emitting warm golden light
wooden rope bridges and platforms connecting the tree structures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide village plaza beneath a night sky. Massive tree buildings with elaborate wooden architecture dominate the background, connected by elevated walkways. Spherical lantern huts cast warm light across the grassy ground as the character moves deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with lookout points and hanging roots

events.description: character stops forward movement and looks up at the massive overhead root structures

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the architecture, looking up at the massive hanging roots and tree canopies

entered.detail: massive thick roots hanging down from the overhead tree structures like organic pillars
small glowing lanterns placed along the ground path

segments.scene_description: The character explores the village center, pausing to look up at the massive hanging root systems overhead. The camera pans to show the scale of the tree-built architecture. Ground lanterns mark pathways through the grassy area while the spherical huts recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown bamboo pathway with red foliage

events.description: enters denser vegetation area with distinctive red plants and bamboo fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow dirt paths surrounded by dense tropical vegetation and red foliage

entered.detail: elevated walkway made of green bamboo poles laid across the path
clusters of distinctive red-leafed plants growing along the path edges
fences made of vertical bamboo poles lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more enclosed, overgrown area with dense tropical vegetation. The path becomes a dirt trail with bamboo plank walkways. Distinctive red foliage clusters appear among the green plants, and bamboo fencing lines the route as the character moves away from the central village structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bamboo walkway leading to distant tribal structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated bamboo pathway toward distant lit structures

entered.detail: elaborate wooden buildings with blue and red accents visible in the distance
tall trees wrapped in thick vines and hanging moss

segments.scene_description: The path continues as an elevated bamboo walkway through increasingly dense jungle. The character approaches distant tribal structures with distinctive architectural details visible through the trees. Vine-covered trunks line the path while the bamboo planks extend forward into the dimly lit forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered tribal entrance into a sprawling village plaza and finally into a dense, overgrown jungle. It begins by passing through a narrow, woven organic archway lit by bioluminescent lanterns and flanked by standing guards. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive tree buildings and elevated walkways, where the camera pans upward to reveal towering root systems and spherical lantern huts. The environment then shifts from the open grassy center toward a more enclosed area of dense tropical vegetation, where dirt trails and bamboo plank walkways are accented by clusters of red foliage. Finally, the path ascends onto an elevated bamboo walkway that winds through vine-covered trunks and dimly lit forest toward distant tribal structures.
